basic.title: Basic Settings
basic.description: Configure the integration name and unit system.

data_description.name: Display name for this integration instance.
data_description.unit_system: Distances reported in miles (imperial) or kilometers (metric).

data_source.title: Data Source
data_source.description: Configure which geo_location entities to monitor.

data_description.geo_location_prefix: Only geo_location entities whose platform matches this prefix will be tracked (e.g. "blitzortung").

timing.title: Timing & Thresholds
timing.description: Configure polling interval, history window, and trend sensitivity.

data_description.time_window_minutes: How far back to look when computing per-sector statistics.
data_description.update_interval_seconds: How often to poll geo_location entities for new strikes.
data_description.approach_threshold: Minimum rate of change (in configured distance units per hour) required to classify a sector as approaching or receding.

error.invalid_prefix: geo_location prefix must be a non-empty string.
error.invalid_window: History window must be a positive integer.
error.invalid_interval: Update interval must be a positive integer.
error.invalid_threshold: Approach threshold must be a positive number.
